Hero.title: Track deliveries to your points
Hero.subtitle: Bananay Delivery Point helps point owners monitor incoming and completed deliveries for selected addresses.

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Build your point list on the map or using address search.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: An admin reviews your request and confirms access to points.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: After approval, see active deliveries and full history for your points.

WhyBecomeCourier.title: Why point owners use it
WhyBecomeCourier.benefit1: One dashboard for all your points
WhyBecomeCourier.benefit4: Add new points with map tools

courier.title: Sign in with phone
courier.description: Enter your phone number - we'll send a login code. If this is your first time here, your account will be created automatically after verification.
courier.telegramBotMvpTitle: To get a code in the MVP
courier.telegramCodeText: Get your login code in Telegram.
courier.telegramBotSuffix: and send it your phone number once.
courier.consentPrefix: By clicking "Get code", you agree to the

Footer.description: An app for retail points: delivery control and status tracking for your locations.

Dashboard.title: Personal account
Dashboard.subtitle: Complete your profile and submit for review.
Dashboard.subtitleActive: Welcome! Complete the daily check-in to start working.

dailyCheckIn.title: Daily Check-in
dailyCheckIn.pendingReviewDescription: Your check-in has been submitted. Waiting for approval.
dailyCheckIn.approvedDescription: You're ready to work. Have a great day!

Onboarding.title: Courier registration
Onboarding.subtitle: Fill in your details, add transport and documents, then submit for review.
Onboarding.payoutStubDescription: Here you will be able to add bank account details. Coming soon.
Onboarding.noVehicles: No vehicles yet. Add at least one.
Onboarding.submitSuccess: Application submitted. We will review it shortly.

DailyCheckIn.title: Daily Check-in
DailyCheckIn.noVehiclesDescription: Add a vehicle in your profile before completing the check-in.
DailyCheckIn.confirmComplete: Tap the button below to send your photos for review. Once approved, you'll be able to take orders.
DailyCheckIn.checkInComplete: Photos submitted for review. Please wait for approval.
DailyCheckIn.pendingReviewDescription: Your check-in has been submitted and is waiting for admin approval.
DailyCheckIn.approvedDescription: You're ready to work. Have a great day!
DailyCheckIn.rejectedDescription: Your check-in was rejected. Please complete it again.

selfie.title: Selfie
selfie.description: Take a clear photo of your face for identity verification.

vehicle_front.title: Vehicle front
vehicle_front.description: Photograph the front of the vehicle with visible plate number.

vehicle_left.title: Left side
vehicle_left.description: Photograph the left side of the vehicle.

vehicle_right.title: Right side
vehicle_right.description: Photograph the right side of the vehicle.

vehicle_rear.title: Vehicle rear
vehicle_rear.description: Photograph the rear of the vehicle.

vehicle_cargo.title: Cargo compartment
vehicle_cargo.description: Photograph the cargo compartment of the vehicle.

TrackingOnboarding.mapLegend:
Green markers — points in your list
Orange markers — available to add
Click a marker to add or remove
TrackingOnboarding.addressSectionDescription: Enter an address to find nearby delivery points within 300 meters.
TrackingOnboarding.addressNoPointsFound: No delivery points within 300 m of this address.
TrackingOnboarding.sidebarEmptyHint: Add points from the map or by address below the map.

DeliveryPointDashboard.title: Delivery Point Dashboard
DeliveryPointDashboard.subtitle: Submit your profile and points for moderation.
DeliveryPointDashboard.incomingDescription: Open list of active deliveries to your points ({count}).
DeliveryPointDashboard.activeListDescription: Add or remove points in your tracking list.
DeliveryPointDashboard.activeListModerationDescription: Newly added points will show deliveries only after admin moderation.
DeliveryPointDashboard.activeListRequirePoints: Add at least one point to continue.
DeliveryPointDashboard.managePointsDescription: Add new points to your list (new points require moderation).
DeliveryPointDashboard.pendingDescription: Your data has been submitted. Wait for admin approval.
DeliveryPointDashboard.formTitle: Tell us about yourself and your points
DeliveryPointDashboard.rejectedDescription: Please update the form and submit again.
DeliveryPointDashboard.aboutPlaceholder: Information about you and your delivery point role
DeliveryPointDashboard.addressSearchPlaceholder: Search address to find nearby points
DeliveryPointDashboard.pointsSearchError: Failed to load nearby delivery points.

DeliveryTasks.title: Delivery tasks
DeliveryTasks.subtitle: Pick up orders from distribution centers and deliver to recipients
DeliveryTasks.noAvailableTasks: No available tasks at the moment. Check back soon.
DeliveryTasks.noHistoryHint: Completed deliveries will appear here after you confirm them.
DeliveryTasks.cancelTaskConfirm: Cancel this delivery task? It will go back to the available list.
DeliveryTasks.qrHint: The worker will scan this code when handing over the goods
DeliveryTasks.scanHint: Point the camera at the QR code at the delivery point
DeliveryTasks.scanCameraDenied: Camera access is required to scan
DeliveryTasks.scanTestHint: Paste QR token (UUID) to simulate a scan.
DeliveryTasks.scanTestPlaceholder: Paste UUID or link with token
